# Asia Weighing

Asia Weighing is the brand of Changzhou Asia Weighing Apparatus Co., Ltd., a manufacturer of industrial weighing equipment in Changzhou, Jiangsu, China.

Core products:
- Bench scales
- Floor scales
- Custom industrial weighing systems

Primary customers:
- Importers and distributors
- Contractors
- EPC companies

Contact:
- Email: ida@asiaweigh.com
- WhatsApp: +86 13775237471

Information on this website should be treated as general product guidance. Final capacity, division, dimensions, materials, interfaces and delivery details must be confirmed in a written quotation.
